name: Greater Polymerization
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>融</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using 3 or more monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material, and if you do, it gains these effects.
● This card cannot be destroyed by card effects.
● If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.
eff:
Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using 3 or more monsters from your hand or field as Fusion Material, and if you do, it gains these effects.
● This card cannot be destroyed by card effects.
● If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing battle damage.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
